title: Candlelight vigil to be held for KwaNonqaba murder victims
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A candlelight vigil will be held in memory KwaNonqaba murder victims Nwabisa Baliso (46) and Luvuyo Mgwelana (43) at the Barcelona Circle at 18:00 tonight, 13 November.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A candlelight vigil will be held in memory KwaNonqaba murder victims Nwabisa Baliso (46) and Luvuyo Mgwelana (43) at the Barcelona Circle at 18:00 tonight, 13 November."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"One of the organisers, Vuyolwethu Ntshizana, said the vigil will also act as a gathering to further take a strong stand against gender-based violence (GBV)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He invited community activists and leaders from across the greater Mossel Bay area, including survivors of GBV.","html":"He invited community activists and leaders from across the greater Mossel Bay area, including survivors of GBV."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Attendees are encouraged to bring candles and wear black with a touch of purple.","html":"Attendees are encouraged to bring candles and wear black with a touch of purple."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Man facing two murder charges appears in Mossel Bay court","Injured man arrested for double murder discharged into police custody","Man under police supervision in hospital after double murder in KwaNonqaba"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Candlelight vigil to be held for KwaNonqaba murder victims
